creator: romain@blogreen.org
text:
Hi!

Now that Gnome 2.24 has been pushed in the FreeBSD ports tree,
ports/124291 is no longer blocked by ports/123036.

In the meantime, nemiver-0.6.4 has been released, so I enclosed a shar
file for that latest version.

ports/124291 - [new port] devel/nemiver: A C/C++ Debugger for GNOME
ports/123036 - [update] x11-toolkits/libgtksourceviewmm version 0.2.0 to 0.3.1

--- nemiver.sh begins here ---
# This is a shell archive.  Save it in a file, remove anything before
# this line, and then unpack it by entering "sh file".  Note, it may
# create directories; files and directories will be owned by you and
# have default permissions.
#
# This archive contains:
#
#	nemiver
#	nemiver/distinfo
#	nemiver/pkg-descr
#	nemiver/pkg-plist
#	nemiver/Makefile
#
echo c - nemiver
mkdir -p nemiver > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x - nemiver/distinfo
sed 's/^X//' >nemiver/distinfo << 'b83552294928913819d69f2fe24d3f31'
XMD5 (gnome2/nemiver-0.6.4.tar.gz) = bc930134ff11ee157d4c0ae9619388d3
XSHA256 (gnome2/nemiver-0.6.4.tar.gz) = e18af0d342ad0bd5d7d71d2012f86b0106b97d15a9a675ad899b8efb92d78fd1
XSIZE (gnome2/nemiver-0.6.4.tar.gz) = 1667868
b83552294928913819d69f2fe24d3f31
echo x - nemiver/pkg-descr
sed 's/^X//' >nemiver/pkg-descr << '1b977aeb5e8493d4bd589fdbcafb8ca7'
XNemiver is an on-going effort to write a standalone graphical debugger that
Xintegrates well in the GNOME desktop environment. It currently features a
Xbackend which uses the well known GNU Debugger gdb to debug C / C++ programs.
X
XWWW:	http://www.gnome.org/projects/nemiver/
1b977aeb5e8493d4bd589fdbcafb8ca7
echo x - nemiver/pkg-plist
sed 's/^X//' >nemiver/pkg-plist << 'f69587de696c1a012b621a9f9376f171'

echo x - nemiver/Makefile
sed 's/^X//' >nemiver/Makefile << '6d9bf64569628526ad178cc2c1c211c5'
X# New ports collection makefile for:	nemiver
X# Date created:		2008-02-22
X# Whom:			Romain Tartiere <romain@blogreen.org>
X#
X# $FreeBSD$
X#
X
XPORTNAME=	nemiver
XPORTVERSION=	0.6.4
XCATEGORIES=	devel
XMASTER_SITES=	${MASTER_SITE_GNOME}
XMASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=	sources/${PORTNAME}/${PORTVERSION:C/^([0-9]+\.[0-9]+).*/\1/}
XDIST_SUBDIR=	gnome2
X
XMAINTAINER=	romain@blogreen.org
XCOMMENT=	A C/C++ Debugger for GNOME
X
XLIB_DEPENDS=	boost_unit_test_framework:${PORTSDIR}/devel/boost \
X		gtop-2.0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/libgtop \
X		sqlite3:${PORTSDIR}/databases/sqlite3 \
X		vte.9:${PORTSDIR}/x11-toolkits/vte \
X		glademm-2.4:${PORTSDIR}/devel/libglademm24 \
X		gtksourceviewmm-2:${PORTSDIR}/x11-toolkits/libgtksourceviewmm
X
XOPTIONS=	GHEX "Enable memory view" off
X
XGNU_CONFIGURE=	yes
XCONFIGURE_TARGET=--build=${MACHINE_ARCH}-portbld-freebsd${OSREL}
XUSE_GMAKE=	yes
XUSE_GNOME=	gnomeprefix gnomehack intltool gnomedocutils gconf2
XGCONF_SCHEMAS=	nemiver-workbench.schemas nemiver-dbgperspective.schemas
XUSE_LDCONFIG=	yes
XUSE_GETTEXT=	yes
XINSTALLS_OMF=	yes
XINSTALLS_ICONS=	yes
XMAN1=		nemiver.1
X
XCONFIGURE_ENV=	CPPFLAGS="${CXXFLAGS} -I${LOCALBASE}/include" \
X		LDFLAGS="-L${LOCALBASE}/lib"
X
X.include <bsd.port.pre.mk>
X
X.if defined(WITH_GHEX) && !defined(WITHOUT_GHEX)
XCONFIGURE_ARGS+=--enable-memoryview
XPLIST_SUB+=	GHEX=""
XLIB_DEPENDS+=	gtkhex.0:${PORTSDIR}/editors/ghex
X.else
XCONFIGURE_ARGS+=--disable-memoryview
XPLIST_SUB+=	GHEX="@comment "
X.endif
X
X.include <bsd.port.post.mk>
6d9bf64569628526ad178cc2c1c211c5
exit
--- nemiver.sh ends here ---
